transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Analyze the baseline (makespan 192). Compute Factory A completion times for each job, then try to build an improved schedule by reordering jobs on machines to reduce idle time and overlap Factory A/B better. Key bottleneck appears to be the long chain through Factory A and then Factory B. Strategy: (1) Compute lower bounds for each job's Factory A finish time. (2) Try aggressive reordering - schedule shorter Factory A jobs first to release them for Factory B sooner. (3) Manually construct a candidate schedule with makespan < 192, targeting ~160-170. (4) Verify feasibility carefully. Use one subtask to construct and verify an improved schedule.
